name: Tapenade
recipeInstructions:
Tapenade is a wonderful olive sauce from the south of France. It is delicious on French bread or with crudites and can also make a delicious sauce for grilled meats and fish.
1. Place all ingredients (except basil) in a blender.
2. Blend on high speed until smooth.
3. If necessary, add more olive oil to achieve desired consistency.
4. Pour the mixture into a bowl.
5. Stir in the minced basil.
6. The tapenade will keep for 10 days.
